# viettelidc_vks_kubeconfig (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving VKS Cluster Kubeconfig.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tra cá»©u Kubeconfig cá»§a Cá»¥m
data "viettelidc_vks_kubeconfig" "admin_config" {
  cluster_id = "1477"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `kubeconfig` (String, Sensitive)
